paper_title: GPT-NeoX-20B: An Open-Source Autoregressive Language Model

extraction_data.innovation: The main innovation of GPT-NeoX-20B is its ability to learn from diverse data sources, including but not limited to, Wikipedia, books, and other external datasets. This approach enhances its knowledge base and improves its performance across various tasks.
extraction_data.extension: Open source, fine-tuned version of GPT-NeoX-20B
